tracks.rawText: 5:23Studio Selectionv5CoverUpbeat and energetic pop-rock anthem with a driving 4/4 rhythm at approximately 124 BPM, The track features bright, overdriven electric guitar riffs, a punchy bassline, and a crisp drum kit with a prominent snare, The arrangement follows a classic verse-chorus structure, building tension with palm-muted guitars in the verses and exploding into a wide, layered sound in the chorus, The male lead vocal is powerful and melodic, utilizing a slight rasp in the higher register for emotional impact, Production is polished with modern compression, subtle reverb on the vocals, and wide stereo panning for the rhythm guitars, The harmonic progression is centered around a major key, utilizing common pop-rock power chords to create a sense of optimism and movement11PublishRemix
tracks.title: Studio Selection

tracks.rawText: 2:45❄️ Título: “Ice en el bolsillo”v5Quiero que la canción sea **cantada al estilo de *Coco*** (coros festivos, energía de mariachi/folklore latino, voces expresivas y emotivas), con **interjecciones y gritos rítmicos tipo “changos”** entre frases para subir la energía, Voces principales claras y coros que respondan, con **gritos tribales/júbilo** en los breaks y en el coro, Ritmo alegre, percusión marcada, guitarras y trompetas brillantes, El resultado debe sonar **celebratorio, callejero y muy vivo**, con llamadas y respuestas y gritos que acentúen los golpes del ritmo1PublishRemix
tracks.title: ❄️ Título: “Ice en el bolsillo”

tracks.rawText: 3:20Studio Selectionv5CoverA driving techno house track built on a pulsing four-on-the-floor kick, syncopated hi-hats, and layered percussive textures, The bassline is deep and repetitive, locked in with a minimal chord stab, Atmospheric pads and evolving synth leads intensify through each breakdown and drop2PublishRemix
